main_thread_duties: Own critical-path blockers and dependency clarification.
Review each checkpoint before launching the next wave.
Handle integration, merge conflicts, and final verification.

questions: Do the remaining batches still have valid assumptions?

assumptions: Dependency extraction relies on explicit 'after ...' phrases in the source text.
Write-scope conflicts are inferred from exact scope-string overlap.
risks: Hidden shared files can still reduce the safety of parallel batches.
Freeform input may omit dependencies that require manual correction.
verification_boundaries: Generated artifacts describe expected verification; they do not prove commands were run.
Later waves remain provisional until checkpoint review confirms the assumptions still hold.
